name: DTG Quality Check
description: Quality inspection checklist for Direct-to-Garment (Kornit Apollo) decorated garments.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Centered within ±3mm of spec
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Visual check: design placement matches order spec ±3mm

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Match to approved swatch within ΔE ≤ 3.0
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Compare to approved digital proof. Reject if obvious color cast or missing colors.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No bleed beyond 1mm
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect perimeter of print area. No uncontrolled ink spread.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No visible pretreat residue after cure
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: No white haze or wet spots on printed area. If residue present, check cure temp/time.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No ink transfer on reverse press
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Apply reverse pressure test paper. No transfer acceptable. If fail, extend cure.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No scorch, stretch, or distortion
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect garment around print area. No thermal damage to fabric.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Full coverage in solid areas
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: No white pinholes or unprinted gaps in solid fill areas.

name: DTF Quality Check
description: Quality inspection checklist for Direct-to-Film (STAHLS' Fulfill Engine) heat-transfer decorated garments.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No peel, lift, or bubble at edges
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Flex the garment. Transfer edges must remain fully bonded. Any lift = fail.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Centered within ±3mm of spec
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Measure placement from collar/hem reference point against order spec.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Smooth, no film bubbles or wrinkles
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect transfer surface. No trapped air, wrinkles, or surface texture inconsistencies.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Match to approved proof
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Compare to approved digital/physical proof. No significant color shift.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No film residue remaining
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Confirm hot/cold peel completed per recipe. No carrier film shreds on surface.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No press marks or scorch on garment
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect area outside transfer boundary for press plate marks or scorch lines.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Transfer intact after simulated wash
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Periodic sample test only. Transfer must not crack or peel at 60°C wash.

name: Embroidery Quality Check
description: Quality inspection checklist for embroidered garments (Tajima TMEF-H1506).

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Design matches approved DST proof ±2mm
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Compare physical embroidery to approved proof card. Placement within 2mm.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No looping, pulls, or puckering
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect both sides of embroidery. No visible bobbin thread on face. No fabric puckering.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Thread colors match approved color map
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Compare each thread color to the recipe's thread color map. No substitutions without approval.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No sparse or open areas in solid fills
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect solid fill areas. No gap or see-through areas in the embroidery coverage.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: Stabilizer fully removed or trimmed per spec
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Tearaway: fully removed. Cutaway: trimmed to ¼ inch of design. Water-soluble: fully dissolved.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: All jump stitches trimmed flush
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: No thread tails longer than 3mm visible on face of garment. Back trims within 5mm.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No stray needle holes outside design boundary
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Inspect fabric around design perimeter. No stray needle punctures or fabric damage.

item_quality_inspection_parameter.value: No hoop ring marks on visible garment area
item_quality_inspection_parameter.acceptance_criteria: Check for circular press marks from hooping. Light shadow marks may be steamed out; permanent marks = fail.
